scripts.start:ngrok: cd ../ui && node scripts/bump-version.js && cd ../api && npm run build:ui && node server.js
scripts.start:cloudflare: pkill -f 'node.*server.js' 2>/dev/null; cd ../ui && node scripts/bump-version.js && npm run build:ngrok && cd ../api && cloudflared tunnel run teng-local &>/tmp/cf.log & node server.js
